issues.what: All 3 auditors flag the glad-load bundle (taught piece + introduction-jar + bright handsels + intel, all from answering an asking) as the 'single richest flow' / 'passive spine' (~54% of card-power). The napkin's no_dominant_source check PASSED (glad-load is calendar-capped, can't stand the crown alone, >=3 independent doors every run), so it is central-but-bounded, not dominant.
issues.fix: game-loop confirms glad-load centrality does not flatten build diversity or make answer-everything the only viable line; if it does, redistribute richness to the active doors (Fair draft, courting, gleaning).

issues.what: The §2/§3 on-curve prose arithmetic budgets influx as ~1 taught piece/asking + a bounded Fair burst, omitting P4 (masters)/P5 (bench)/P7 (crown) from the written budget — though the napkin models the full arc and passed deck_growth_on_curve.
issues.fix: Complete the §2/§3 prose budget to include P4/P5/P7 (the napkin already accounts for them); non-blocking.

issues.what: the-courting-market (M1) and 'Paling Market' use 'market', which WORLD.md:723 bans as a diegetic metaphor for gift/courtship scenes.
issues.fix: L6 renders M1 diegetically (the-courting / the-vouching / the-stalls-that-lean-in), never an in-world 'market'. No mechanical change.

issues.what: §0/the-inert-delivery assert categorically that EVERY acquired piece enters inert and paling-prone; a couple of sources (first-gift, some hearth upgrades) may be edge cases to the absolute.
issues.fix: Soften the absolute or enumerate the exceptions; non-blocking.

issues.what: Executable coefficients (taught-tier curve, thinning rate vs crown curve, glad-price brightening < tempo cost, Fair k/N + intercept freq, waking-capacity-per-turn < difficulty-per-ring, retire residual curve) are structural not yet numerically fit.
issues.fix: game-loop fits and simulates these; the structural shapes are committed in L4 §5 and must hold under tuning (D-005.3/I-022).

summary: Layer 4 acquisition model (AUTO+napkin). Supply-is-geography spine (proposal B) grafted with reward-pull (A). ~21 acquisition sources across journey-pieces (glad-load gate-teach, Fair draft, waymeet swap, masters, the bench, first-gift, crown unlocks), materials (courting-market, jars, festival-glass, gleaning, apprentice floor), and handsels (whittling, shavings-share, glad-load, glad-price, doorstep, gifts), + map-intel. All 3 blind auditors: full legibility (intuitiveness 1.0), no P0/P1. Napkin (executable, engine-run) passed all 7 checks incl. deck_growth_on_curve (stands crown 100%, 1.3x margin), no_dominant_source (glad-load 54% but calendar-capped, can't solo crown, >=3 doors), no_degenerate_acquisition_loop (retire<->twice-benched double-close nets negative), thinning_viable. Central-but-bounded glad-load flagged for game-loop; market-register naming -> L6; numeric coefficients -> game-loop.

checks.name: deck_growth_on_curve
checks.detail: per-season power [med,p05,p95] vs need green:8.0/7.0-10.0(need6.0); long:22.0/18.0-28.0(need18.0); deepgold:38.0/32.0-44.0(need32.0); redwalk:65.0/56.0-75.0(need50.0) | monotone=True mid<crown=True crown_floor=50.0 end_power_med=65.0 stands_crown=1.0 (deck grows onto the curve, stays below the crown mid-run, stands it by autumn)

checks.name: no_dominant_source
checks.detail: >=3 card doors in 1.0 of runs; solo-source-stands-crown (keystone) in 0.0 of runs; glad_load power share med=0.544 p95=0.631 (richest flow, but calendar-capped: cannot stand the crown alone); materials max-door p95=0.375<=0.40 (no keystone faucet on cards OR materials)

checks.name: no_degenerate_acquisition_loop
checks.detail: retire<->twice-benched CLOSED: material 8.0->0.0 (terminal, decays), attn 40.0->-28.0 (nets negative), halts=True; unclosed-variant WOULD explode=True (the two closes are load-bearing) | Handsel Round mint-clean: regard 100.0->worst 100.0 (non-increasing) | glad faucet calendar-bounded: max influx 20<=30 nodes (each answers once)

checks.name: thinning_viable
checks.detail: aggressive thinning holds deck<=16 in 0.996 of runs; deck never thins below 5 (floor held in 1.0); default end-deck in [15,24] in 0.982 (arc ~18-22); thin keeps pace with influx (aggressive p95 size=15.0<=18) — the pack is a garden, keepable focused, never emptyable

checks.name: skip_ripen_not_dominant
checks.detail: cap-growth/morning=3.82 < diff-growth/ring=7.78 -> ripe need out-scales; skip-run end power 40.3 < crown floor 50.0 (skipper may not stand the crown) -> high-risk style, not a dominant solve

checks.name: fair_faucet_bounded
checks.detail: buy-a-teaching tempo 14.0 > answer-an-asking tempo 10.0 (no money->card arbitrage); windowed k/N=3/9; fair power share p95=0.261<=0.30 — a bounded trade, never a card-shop or keystone faucet

checks.name: deliberate_failure_ev_negative
checks.detail: lane-glimmer value 0.4<1 Standing, spiller-claimable=0.0; spiller EV=-3.0<0 -> no flop-to-farm
